title: RAID demo and conference page acquisition record
paper_title: Scaling Expert Feedback with Reflective Edit Propagation in Compositional Knowledge Bases
evidence_status: time-bounded official-page acquisition; not a code/data release and not a deep review

sources.relationship: author-linked demo-materials page cited by the immutable paper
sources.extraction_status: dynamic Notion application shell only; returned HTML exposes only the title Notion after scripts/styles are removed, so it is not substantive page evidence

sources.extraction_method: Python stdlib HTMLParser; scripts, styles, noscript, and SVG content omitted; whitespace normalized

queries: exact paper title + code + GitHub + RAID
first author + RAID + CAIS 2026 demo materials
release_search.observation: Search results surfaced the arXiv record/HTML, ACM DOI, official CAIS demo page, author page, and third-party summaries, but no author-verifiable code repository or released benchmark/user-study dataset. The official CAIS page exposes only the ACM paper under Artifacts & Links. This is a time-bounded negative search observation, not proof that no release exists elsewhere.

notes: The public RxTerms source is an upstream terminology resource, not a released RAID benchmark snapshot or result ledger.
The proprietary semiconductor knowledge base and user-study records are not represented by these acquired pages.
HTTP response-header files were retained locally for troubleshooting but are excluded from provenance paths because the Notion response set transient cookies.
